exercises.header: When do you come back from work?
I cook every evening for my family.
exercises.answer: Μαγειρεύω κάθε βράδυ για την οικογένειά μου.

exercises.header: I like to cook new recipes.
exercises.answer: Μου αρέσει να μαγειρεύω νέες συνταγές.

exercises.header: I have dinner with my family every evening.
exercises.answer: Δειπνώ με την οικογένειά μου κάθε βράδυ.

exercises.header: What time do you usually have dinner?
I sleep eight hours every night.
When do you usually go to sleep?
I relax on the sofa after work.
exercises.answer: Χαλαρώνω στον καναπέ μετά τη δουλειά.

exercises.header: I need a bit of relaxation today.
I'm in a hurry today, I don't have time.
Don't be in a hurry, we have time!
I wake up early every morning.
